kofi_products.name: Desert Rose at Dawn
kofi_products.description: A desert rose blooming at first light -- symbol of resilience and the enduring beauty of Palestinian land. AI-generated art print. 70% of every sale goes to PCRF (Palestinian Children's Relief Fund, EIN 93-1057665). Digital download, print at any size.

kofi_products.name: White Doves Over the Mediterranean
kofi_products.description: White doves in flight above the Mediterranean coast -- peace, migration, and the sky that belongs to everyone. AI-generated art print. 70% of every sale goes to PCRF. Digital download.

kofi_products.name: Olive Grove Eternal
kofi_products.description: Ancient olive trees -- some thousands of years old -- standing through centuries of history. Palestinian olive groves are among the oldest cultivated landscapes on earth. AI-generated art print. 70% to PCRF. Digital download.

kofi_products.name: Tatreez Pattern Bloom
kofi_products.description: Traditional Palestinian embroidery (tatreez) patterns blooming into a field of color. Each pattern carries regional identity passed through generations of women. AI-generated art print. 70% to PCRF. Digital download.

kofi_products.name: Gaza Coastline at Golden Hour
kofi_products.description: The Gaza coastline at golden hour -- the Mediterranean catching light the way it always has. Some things persist. AI-generated art print. 70% to PCRF. Digital download.
kofi_products.tags: gaza, coast, mediterranean, golden hour, art

kofi_products.name: Star of Hope Rising
kofi_products.description: A star rising over Palestinian land -- the kind of image that holds grief and hope at the same time. Sometimes that is what art is for. AI-generated art print. 70% to PCRF. Digital download.

quick_revenue.exchange_promo:
Subject: I built an AI agent that does tasks by email for $0.10 (15% goes to Gaza)

Hi,

I built a system called SolarPunk that processes AI tasks by email.

How it works:
  1. Email meekotharaccoon@gmail.com with [TASK] in the subject
  2. Describe what you need (content, research, code review, translation, data)
  3. The system responds with completed work within 6 hours
  4. Pay $0.05-$0.10 via Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/meekotharaccoon
  5. 15% goes to PCRF (Palestinian children's charity, EIN 93-1057665)

This is useful for:
  - Content generation at scale
  - Quick research synthesis
  - Light code review
  - Translation tasks
  - Structuring messy data

The AI is live right now. Runs 4x daily.
Full source (MIT, free to fork): https://github.com/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center

-- SolarPunk Autonomous AI
   (Automated email. A human reviews all replies.)
quick_revenue.sponsor_bio: Building SolarPunk -- autonomous AI that funds Gaza. $1 products, 15% hardcoded to PCRF. github.com/sponsors/meekotharaccoon-cell
quick_revenue.sponsor_readme:
## Support

[![Sponsor](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub_Sponsor-%E2%9D%A4-red)](https://github.com/sponsors/meekotharaccoon-cell)
[![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Buy_a_print_$1-orange)](https://ko-fi.com/meekotharaccoon)

15% of everything goes to [PCRF](https://www.pcrf.net/) (EIN: 93-1057665). Hardcoded. Not a pledge.
